title: tarenna sambucina
intro: Tarenna sambucina, also known as Sambuci Flos, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. The plant's flowers, leaves, and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Tarenna sambucina has been used to alleviate various health issues, including respiratory problems, fever, and digestive issues, and is believed to have a positive effect on the immune system and cardiovascular health. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some traditional herbal remedies, such as cough syrups and expectorants.
